title: calea reticulata
intro: Calea reticulata, also known as 'Mexican Damiana', is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its ability to relieve various health issues. The health benefits of Calea reticulata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and other hormonal imbalances. Calea reticulata is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide the associated health benefits.
